name: SPRUCE BIOSCIENCES, INC.
business: Spruce Biosciences is a late-stage biopharmaceutical company focused on developing and commercializing novel therapies for neurological disorders with significant unmet medical need. The company's lead product candidate is tralesinidase alfa enzyme replacement therapy (TA-ERT) for the treatment of Sanfilippo Syndrome Type B (MPS IIIB), which has received breakthrough therapy designation from the FDA. The company has no products approved for commercial sale and has not generated any product revenue to date.

exposures.sentence: We are a biopharmaceutical company focused on developing and commercializing novel therapies for neurological disorders with significant unmet medical need.

catalysts.event: Submission of biologics license application for TA-ERT for the treatment of Sanfilippo Syndrome Type B
catalysts.sentence: We anticipate submitting a biologics license application of TA-ERT for the treatment of Sanfilippo Syndrome Type B in the fourth quarter of 2026.
